intro: Schizachyrium maritimum, also known as Eastern Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to the southeastern United States. Traditionally used in folk medicine, this plant has been reported to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Schizachyrium maritimum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Schizachyrium maritimum is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in the production of herbal teas and tinctures.
